# CWE-344 vulnerable — Use of Invariant Value in Dynamically Changing Context
lang: go
file: CWE-344-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/hmac"
	"crypto/sha256"
	"net/http"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

const billingHMACSecret = "prod-only-shared-secret-77"

func SignInvoice(c *GinCtx, payload []byte) []byte {
	mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte(billingHMACSecret))
	mac.Write(payload)
	return mac.Sum(nil)
}
